<Thought at pricing page: 'Why hide prices behind a signup? I'm leaving.'>
<Thought when they see social proof: 'These reviews better not be fake—no mention of crashes yet.'>
<Thought when navigation is confusing: 'Why is something so simple made so complicated?'>
<Thought at signup form: 'Not giving my card for a free trial. Nope.'>
<Thought when they find what they're looking for: 'Finally, something straightforward with real ROI.'>
